title: AAYS deep watchdog recovery and TerraYield FGC discovery
scope: Long read-only diagnostic run. First verify why PARCELSALES 011 did not emit ai-results/parcelsales_011_long_orchestrator.md. Then run parallel discovery for TerraYield FGC blockers. No database writes. No destructive file operations.
self_correction_rules: If the expected PARCELSALES result is missing, classify the previous run as stuck or not-started and include likely reason.
If a named script is missing, search for closest matching scripts and report alternate candidates rather than stopping.
If one discovery branch blocks, continue the other branches and write partial outputs.
Use read-only checks only: directory listing, log reading, source scanning, metadata summaries, and result-file summaries.
Write heartbeat/progress notes every few minutes so the next continuation can distinguish slow work from a hang.
parallel_branches: TerraYield FGC source and log discovery
Candidate data/database inventory without opening sensitive values
